mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, LOGIN_ID AS loginId, PASSWORD AS password, NICKNAME AS nickname, PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS profileImageUrl, MEMBER_ROLE AS memberRole, MEMBER_STATUS AS memberStatus FROM HM_MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}

SELECT LOGIN_ID AS loginId, NICKNAME AS nickname, NAME AS name, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, GENDER AS gender, BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS profileImageUrl FROM HM_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT PASSWORD FROM HM_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM HM_MEMBER WHERE LOWER(EMAIL) = LOWER(#{email}) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HM_MEMBER ( LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, NICKNAME, EMAIL, PHONE, BIRTH_DATE, GENDER, IDENTITY_VERIFIED_YN ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{encodedPassword}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{birthDate}, #{gender}, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE HM_MEMBER SET NICKNAME = CONCAT('탈퇴회원', MEMBER_ID), EMAIL = CONCAT('deleted_', MEMBER_ID, '@hobbymate.local'), CI_HASH = NULL, MEMBER_STATUS = 'WITHDRAWN', WITHDRAWN_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
